headline: Micron, Alphabet, Builders FirstSource, Sunrun, Wendy’s, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: Stocks moved higher Wednesday as artificial-intelligence stocks steadied. While AI names weren’t necessarily rising during the session, there weren’t steep declines either, and stocks in many other sectors were leading the gains.  Micron Technology  fell 0.7%.  Reuters reported Qualcomm was in talks to provide custom chips for TikTok owner ByteDance.

headline: Which AI Server Stock Has Dominated in 2026: Super Micro, Dell, or Hewlett Packard Enterprise?
summary: There’s a clear, undeniable winner this year among three major AI server stocks. Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) stock has dominated 2026, with Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) a strong second and Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) a distant third. The gap between the three is striking, given that all three are riding the same AI infrastructure wave. As ... headline: StorMagic and Supermicro Collaborate to Simplify and Deliver High-Availability Edge Infrastructure
summary: StorMagic®, simplifying on-site virtualization, and Supermicro (NASDAQ: SMCI), a total IT solution provider for AI, cloud, storage and edge computing, today announced the companies will collaborate on virtualized infrastructure solutions for edge, ROBO and small datacenter environments.
